content.full_text:
This is a memorandum from the Fair Political Practices Commission, dated June 1, 1983, with the reference number M-83-142. The memo is addressed to File and signed by Janis Shank McLean.

Subject: Charles Imbrecht, Energy Commission

The memo states:

Official received $250 or more in contributions from the "PG&E Good Government PAC." Because the PAC is separate from PG&E, the official can vote on an application by PG&E.

JSM:plh
